categories.excel_pdf: Excel workbook exported/embedded as PDF — flat table structure lost
categories.scanned_pdf: Scanned paper document, no machine-readable text layer
categories.dwg: AutoCAD DWG drawing with annotations, schedules, and dimension tables

_meta.instructions: Place document files in benchmark/docs/ matching each 'filename'. Run benchmark/runner.py, then benchmark/score.py to label answers.

docs.description: Annual department budget report exported from Excel (multi-sheet)
docs.source_hint: Use any multi-department Excel budget saved as PDF

questions.question: What is the total budget for the Engineering department?
questions.expected_answer_hint: Exact dollar figure from Engineering row

questions.question: Which department had the largest budget increase compared to the prior year?
questions.expected_answer_hint: Department name + percentage or dollar delta

questions.question: What is the sum of Q3 and Q4 expenses across all departments?
questions.expected_answer_hint: Requires summing two columns across multiple rows

questions.question: List all departments with budget over $500,000.
questions.expected_answer_hint: List of department names; tests multi-row extraction

questions.question: What was the total headcount cost as a percentage of the overall budget?
questions.expected_answer_hint: Ratio or percentage; requires cross-row calculation

docs.description: Project status tracker exported from Excel (gantt-style table)
docs.source_hint: Multi-project status spreadsheet with dates, owners, status columns

questions.question: Which projects are currently marked as 'At Risk'?
Who is the owner of the longest-running project?
How many projects are scheduled to complete in Q4?
What is the total estimated hours for all In-Progress projects?
questions.expected_answer_hint: Sum from estimated hours column, In-Progress rows only

questions.question: Which project has the most dependencies listed?

docs.description: Warehouse inventory list from Excel (part numbers, quantities, prices)
docs.source_hint: SKU/part number table with unit prices and stock levels

questions.question: What is the total value of all items currently in stock?
questions.expected_answer_hint: Sum of (quantity × unit_price) for all rows

questions.question: Which item has the highest unit price?
How many unique suppliers are represented in the inventory?
List all items with fewer than 10 units remaining.
questions.expected_answer_hint: List of SKUs/names with their quantities

questions.question: What category of items represents the largest portion of total inventory value?
questions.expected_answer_hint: Category name + percentage or dollar value

docs.description: Multi-page financial statement exported from Excel (P&L + balance sheet)
docs.source_hint: Public company annual report or sample financial statement spreadsheet

questions.question: What was the gross profit margin for the most recent fiscal year?
questions.expected_answer_hint: Percentage derived from revenue and COGS rows

questions.question: What is the total long-term debt on the balance sheet?
How did operating expenses change year-over-year?
What is the current ratio (current assets / current liabilities)?
Which expense line item had the largest absolute increase?

docs.description: Scanned paper contract with handwritten corrections
docs.source_hint: Any multi-page scanned contract or agreement; scan quality ≥ 150 DPI

questions.question: What are the names of the two contracting parties?
questions.expected_answer_hint: Both party names from the header

questions.question: What is the effective date of the agreement?
What is the total contract value or fee amount?
What are the termination conditions described in the contract?
What jurisdiction's law governs this agreement?

docs.description: Scanned paper invoice with line items and totals
docs.source_hint: Multi-line scanned invoice; ideally with table structure

questions.question: What is the invoice total including tax?
questions.expected_answer_hint: Dollar total from the bottom of the invoice

questions.question: What is the invoice number?
List all line items and their unit prices.
What is the payment due date?
questions.expected_answer_hint: Date from 'due date' or 'payment terms' field

questions.question: What is the tax rate applied?

docs.description: Architectural floor plan DWG with room labels and area annotations
docs.source_hint: Standard architectural floor plan; any format accepted by DeepParser

questions.question: What is the total floor area of the building in square meters?
How many rooms are labeled on this floor plan?
What is the area of the largest room?
What is the scale of this drawing?
List all rooms with their areas in a table format.
questions.expected_answer_hint: Table of room name → area; tests structured extraction from DWG

docs.description: Structural engineering drawing with member schedules
docs.source_hint: Structural drawing with column/beam schedule table or reinforcement schedule

questions.question: What steel grade is specified for the primary structural members?
How many column types are defined in the column schedule?
What is the maximum beam span shown in the drawing?
What is the live load specified for the floor system?
questions.expected_answer_hint: Load value with units (kPa, psf, etc.)

questions.question: List all beam sections and their designations from the beam schedule.
questions.expected_answer_hint: Table of beam mark → section size

docs.source_hint: HVAC, electrical, or plumbing drawing with equipment/fixture schedule

questions.question: What is the total cooling capacity of the HVAC system shown?
questions.expected_answer_hint: Capacity value with units (tons, kW, BTU/hr)

questions.question: How many electrical panels are shown and what are their ratings?
What pipe material is specified for the domestic water supply?
questions.expected_answer_hint: Material type from notes or schedule

questions.question: List all mechanical equipment with their model numbers.
What is the design supply air temperature for the air handling units?

docs.description: Bill of Materials exported from Excel with nested component hierarchy
docs.source_hint: Multi-level BOM with parent/child part relationships and costs

questions.question: What is the total material cost of the top-level assembly?
Which component has the highest unit cost?
How many unique part numbers are in this BOM?
What is the lead time for the component with the longest lead time?
questions.expected_answer_hint: Part name + lead time in days/weeks

questions.question: List all components sourced from a single supplier.
questions.expected_answer_hint: Parts where supplier = sole source; tests filtering
